title: ancylocladus umbrosus
intro: Ancylocladus umbrosus, a species of coniferous tree, is a type of evergreen tree native to the tropical forests of New Guinea and surrounding islands. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ancylocladus umbrosus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ancylocladus umbrosus can be made by infusing the leaves or bark in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and grinding the plant material for use in capsules or tinctures.
